summary: End-to-end testing of CGR Notification Generator. All 10 backend pytest cases PASSED (100%) and full frontend e2e flow PASSED (page-1 fill, validation, navigation to page-2, reused fields info, date picker popovers, preview dialog, GENERAR AVISO triggering POST /api/generate-notification with responseType=blob and downloading the .docx).
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: server.py defines `logger` AFTER it is referenced inside generate_notification() (logger.warning, logger.exception). Module-level execution order is fine because logger is bound at import time before requests arrive, but the ordering is fragile - move logging.basicConfig() and logger = logging.getLogger(__name__) to the top of the file (before the endpoints) to avoid surprises during refactors.

Minor: MongoDB write inside generate_notification stores the full request payload on every call without TTL/cleanup; consider adding an index or retention policy if this ever becomes a real audit log.
Optional: FastAPI `on_event('shutdown')` is deprecated; consider migrating to lifespan handler.
Note: CORS_ORIGINS='*' combined with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec (browsers ignore it). Either set explicit origins or set allow_credentials=False.
seed_data_creation: None - tests are self-contained; payloads use TEST_ prefix on NOMBRE for MongoDB audit isolation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_notifications.py validate: GET /api/, GET /api/template/status, POST /api/generate-notification (200 + correct content-type + content-disposition + filename + all 16 input values found in generated docx + ENTIDAD reuse in tables + structural integrity (1+ table with 16 rows) + 422 validation for missing/empty fields). Frontend Playwright flow validated through download capture. Date picker popover requires waiting for [role='gridcell'] button and pressing Escape between consecutive popover interactions to avoid stuck overlays.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Implementation matches spec: docxtpl renders all 17 placeholders, ENTIDAD page-2 is auto-populated from ENTIDAD_AFECTADA in server.py (line 115), filename pattern AVISO_<NUMERO_AVISO>_<NOMBRE>.docx is correct, validation via Pydantic min_length=1 returns 422 as expected.
